codeReview.summary: LinkedIn detection/extraction/overlay fundamentals are implemented and tested, but two blocking requirements are not fully met: known-contact overlay context is incomplete, and duplicate detection is page-limited.

issues.description: Known-contact rendering only shows `name/title/company/tags` (lines 200-203). VAL-EXT-013 requires known contact context including relationship status and last interaction date, but those fields are neither fetched nor rendered in the LinkedIn overlay flow.

Duplicate detection is limited to the first 100 contacts (`LOOKUP_PAGE_LIMIT = 100` and `/api/contacts?limit=100` at lines 27 and 63). Contacts beyond page 1 are never checked, so `captureLinkedInProfile` (line 79+) can create duplicates for existing LinkedIn URLs.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The extension skill references setup docs that are missing in the relay repo, which creates procedural drift during worker setup.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill file `/Users/andy/Documents/GitHub/org-planner/.factory/skills/extension-worker/SKILL.md` instructs reading `/Users/andy/Documents/GitHub/relay/.factory/library/architecture.md` and `.factory/research/chrome-extension-mv3.md`, but relay `.factory/library` only contains `user-testing.md` and no `.factory/research` directory exists.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Tests-first procedure was not followed even though `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` is marked true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton ordering for worker session `5e6ec6c5-2e55-41bb-8048-20e5bf4c81bf` shows implementation files created before tests (e.g., `content/linkedin/detector.ts` string index 9417 vs `__tests__/linkedinDetector.test.ts` index 11846).

sharedStateObservations.observation: Validation contract and implementation disagree on lookup strategy for LinkedIn URL matching; this mismatch should be codified in shared state.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: validation-contract.md VAL-EXT-013 expects `/api/contacts?linkedinUrl=<profileUrl>`, while implementation uses `/api/contacts?limit=100` plus client-side filtering (`linkedinService.ts` lines 27, 63-67).

summary: Fail: two blocking gaps remain in commit db504f70 (missing known-contact relationship context in overlay and duplicate detection limited to first-page contacts). Transcript/skill review also found tests-first drift and stale skill references.
